hero.greeting: Joseph — we have been expecting you.
hero.paragraph: Luis introduced you here so you could see what Claude Code can do. Everything on this page was built by an AI in less than a minute. It is also a sandbox you can edit yourself.

showcase.heading: What Claude Code built for you today

reveal.fact: This whole page — copy, layout, the little sailboat, the click you just made — was written by Claude Code. It can run shell commands, edit files, and remember context across sessions. It pairs with you the way a senior engineer would, at the speed of typing.

bio.name: Joseph
bio.tagline: Friend of a friend, here to look around.

your_turn.heading: Your turn
your_turn.intro: This page is also a sandbox. Two ways to make it yours:

browser.heading: Edit in the browser
browser.body: Open the repo, click any file, click the pencil, save. The site rebuilds itself.

local.heading: Use Claude Code locally
local.body: Run the three commands below. The third drops you into a Claude Code session inside the project — ask it anything.
local.first_edit: Try this first: ask claude to change your hero greeting to something you like. It will edit index.html for you.

items.label: Lyra on LINE
